page_metadata.biotools__summary: Alvis is a tool for contig and read ALignment VISualisation and chimera detection. It produces LaTeX and SVG alignment diagrams from a number of common alignment formats.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Alvis is a tool for contig and read ALignment VISualisation and chimera detection. It produces LaTeX and SVG alignment diagrams from a number of common alignment formats.
